text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: finalized_height >= request_height

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: PacketCommitment

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: AckCommitment

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: ReceiptCommitment

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: (non-membership)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Require: request_height is already finalized

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: We assume that the commitment is retrieved in finalized_height, otherwise, no attestation will be made

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Case 1: Commitment also exists in request_height

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This case is safe because the attestor isn't lying about anything

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Case 2: Commitment does not exist in request_height

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: The attestor is lying about the commitment being present at request_height.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This packet was actually sent at some height between finalized_height and request_height.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: In this case, there is nothing wrong about relaying this packet from an earlier height because:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. The packet was actually sent.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. The packet's content is correct (including timeout_timestamp)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. Replay and timeout protection exists in the receiving chain.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. The packet has not timedout at finalized_height. (Otherwise the commitment would be deleted)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: We assume that the commitment is retrieved in finalized_height, otherwise, no attestation will be made

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Case 1: Commitment also exists in request_height

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This case is safe because the attestor isn't lying about anything

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Case 2: Commitment does not exist in request_height

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: The attestor is lying about the commitment being present at request_height,

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This ack was committed at some height between finalized_height and request_height.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: In this case, there is nothing wrong about relaying this ack from an earlier height because:

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji
Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 1. The packet was actually sent.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 2. The packet's content is correct (including timeout_timestamp)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 3. The ack's content is correct.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 4. Replay protection exists in the receiving chain.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: 5. The packet has not timed out in Solana (due to ack existing in finalized_height)

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: We assume that the commitment is not found in finalized_height, otherwise, no attestation will be made.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: This requires that the commitment is also not found in request_height, so the attestor is not lying
